name: Tortellini Vegetable Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. If necessary, defrost vegetables and chop them into 1/4-inch pieces. Set aside on a plate.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
3. Decrease heat to low and add the chopped vegetables. Cook uncovered for 5 minutes if using cooked vegetables; cover and cook for 10 minutes if using uncooked ones.
4. Stir in flour and add milk. Cook, stirring, another 2 minutes or until mixture thickens.
5. Add salt and pepper. Remove skillet from heat and stir in egg, salt, pepper, and rosemary. Scrape the mixture into a bowl to cool.
6. Stuffing can be stored, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 7 days. To freeze, place 1-cup amounts of stuffing in airtight freezer bags or containers, label and place in freezer for up to 3 months.
